chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 12 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 28.03.2024 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that applicant has been acquitted by the trial Court; hence, he does not press this bail application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
